issue_log.item: Redken Shades EQ full 2024 chart PDF
issue_log.details: Official full chart PDF returns HTTP 500; extraction will combine the official shade-chart hub page, the 1001 Blondes subset PDF, and a Tier-2 distributor chart, with confidence flags.

issue_log.item: Wella Koleston Perfect complete per-shade chart
issue_log.details: Wella is app-first (Wella Companion); no single complete official per-SKU PDF chart located. Extraction will rely on official usage booklet + distributor enumeration; per-shade completeness flagged medium confidence.
Bot protection timeouts during Stage 2; distributor enumeration relies on salon-services.com (UK) and professionalstore.com pages, with region caveats.
